description: Plugin-distributed hooks for finops-cloud-cost. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags FinOps anti-patterns (untagged resources, on-demand with no commitment note, hard-coded cost figures without a date, RI/SP purchase without break-even analysis). Set FINOPS_CLOUD_COST_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
